TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chucky_Brown, title = Chucky_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chucky_Brown} }

S.FORM: Chucky Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1968, byacing te 2 ru 29 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga New York, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 201 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 97 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1989 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Cleveland Cavaliers. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Chucky Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1968, byacing te 2 ru 29 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga New York, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 201 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 97 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1989 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Cleveland Cavaliers. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħuʦ~ʨkj βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa new jork, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨle*elan* ʦ~ʨa*aliers~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
